decision: Use Django 6 + Templates + Tailwind + HTMX + Alpine.js as target stack for Tour2Tech portfolio modernization
reasoning: Standardize 60+ projects on a modern, cohesive stack

decision: Use Vanilla JS instead of Vue.js for Tour2Tech PMO
reasoning: User explicitly rejected Vue.js framework for this project

decision: Switch PlaceChain theme from dark to light mode
reasoning: Design decision to change brand aesthetic

decision: Build Universal Agent Adapter as standalone TypeScript package
reasoning: Translation membrane between universal interface and provider-specific SDKs (Claude, OpenAI, Google)

decision: Disable all telemetry and error reporting in Claude Code
Route Haiku model tier to GPT-5.4 via CCS proxy for cost optimization
reasoning: Use Claude Code UX while routing commodity tasks to cheaper providers

decision: Run own plugin marketplace (awesome-claude-skills) for custom skill distribution
reasoning: Faster iteration without going through Anthropic review process
